brief: Domain spotlight (lore intro) for the Infernus realm in VOIDBORN. Visual identity: volcanic forge, ember-lit hellscape, demonic smiths, lava rivers, crimson and charcoal. Lore themes: forge demons, lava elementals, armor, burn, chain lords, ash hounds. Describe the realm's culture, bastions, and role in the war against the Aether Bleed / Void corruption. Tease iconic units and the feeling of playing Infernus decks. City backdrop sets the mood. Instagram punchy + hashtags including #Infernus; Facebook epic lore story + community question; Discord markdown realm guide + play link https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: A cinematic square wide shot of a massive, dark fantasy volcanic forge, glowing rivers of magma flowing through a jagged obsidian landscape, demonic figures in silhouette hammering giant glowing metal plates, embers and ash floating in the air, high contrast crimson and charcoal color palette, epic dark fantasy art style.
